subject: [PATCH v3 5/8] io_uring/kbuf: add recycling for kernel managed buffer rings

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds an interface to recycle kernel-managed buffers back into a buffer ring, allowing for more efficient use of memory and reducing the need for frequent allocations. The recycling process involves checking if the buffer can be safely reused, updating its metadata, and incrementing the tail pointer in the buffer ring. This feature is designed to improve performance by minimizing memory fragmentation and reducing the overhead of buffer allocation and deallocation.
